---
title: "Instructor Only: Grouped Distributions Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
nhanes <- read_csv("data/real/nhanes_2021_2023_analysis.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

adult_bp <- nhanes |>
  filter(age_years >= 18, !is.na(age_group), !is.na(systolic_mean))

ggplot(adult_bp, aes(x = age_group, y = systolic_mean)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "gray85") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Adult Systolic Blood Pressure By Age Group",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean systolic blood pressure"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
